cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Software Engineer role at Assurity Trusted Solutions. Your focus on translating functional requirements into secure, high quality applications aligns with my background in JavaScript development and full SDLC workflow projects.

I currently develop and maintain software in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics, including an eye-tracking system. On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack React app with Supabase auth and PostgreSQL. I also built an automated job search pipeline using n8n and AI agents to handle complex data workflows similar to ITSM processes.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2024. I am particularly interested in how ATS secures digital landscapes through GovTech collaboration and would like to bring my automation skills to your engineering team.

Aodren Gloux
